description:
Replace coarse expect_clif_contains / expect_clif_excludes spot checks with full per-fixture golden CLIF snapshots. Every commit's effect on codegen becomes visible as a precise diff; intentional changes re-bless explicitly.

## Motivation

Three .21 optimization attempts in the last sessions failed in part because there was no stable reference for what 'better' looks like. Each attempt: implement → run tests → check halt values → debug → revert. The CLIF was changing in subtle ways but the test harness couldn't see it.

Golden CLIF fixes this. The optimization workflow becomes:

1. Pin current state as goldens (status quo).
2. Pre-write the goldens we WANT — these are the acceptance criteria.
3. Implement; goldens diff against the WANT version.
4. Re-bless explicitly with the optimization commit.

Regressions in unrelated fixtures show up as immediate test failures with full diffs.

## Work

1. Add a snapshot test harness in tests/fixture_matrix.rs (or tests/golden_clif.rs). For every fixture with a sibling .clif file (or marked with a # golden_clif: directive — TBD during impl), dump via fz dump --emit clif and compare to the golden. Fail on diff. BLESS=1 cargo test overwrites.

2. Bless initial set: add1.fz + the four §8 fixtures (tail_recursion, higher_order, closure_typed_captures, concurrency_ping_pong). 5 .clif files committed.

3. Document the workflow inline at the top of the snapshot test + in a short fixtures/GOLDEN.md.

4. Retire — or keep as belt-and-suspenders — the existing expect_clif_contains / expect_clif_excludes assertions on the blessed fixtures. The diff IS the assertion now.

## Determinism

Cranelift's CLIF dump should be deterministic for the same input + same Cranelift version. Spec IDs are source-order. Value numbers are SSA-deterministic. FuncId numbering follows declaration order in compile_with_backend (fixed). Any non-determinism that surfaces gets either fixed at the source or normalized in the test before comparison.

## Acceptance

- fixtures/add1.clif exists, committed, matches current fz dump output.
- Same for tail_recursion.clif, higher_order.clif, closure_typed_captures.clif, concurrency_ping_pong.clif.
- cargo test --workspace green at HEAD (current state pinned).
- Mutating ir_codegen.rs in a way that changes any fixture's CLIF causes the test to fail with a full diff.
- BLESS=1 cargo test golden_clif overwrites all goldens from actual output.
- fixtures/GOLDEN.md documents the workflow.

## Out of scope

- Golden assembly / final machine code (separate ticket — runtime cost, not codegen shape).
- Microbenchmarks (separate ticket).
- Cranelift version pinning beyond what Cargo.toml already constrains (separate ticket if needed).
- Auto-blessing on every CI run (manual gate intentionally — bless is a deliberate act).

## After this lands

.21 / typed-closure-ABI / .27 work resumes with full visibility. Every optimization commit's diff IS the review.
title: fz-ul4.32: golden CLIF fixtures — pin codegen output for regression + optimization visibility
